Hero.description: NexaWorks is a lightweight browser extension that silently reads your messy Slack, Zendesk, and CRM data to hand you a 1-page executive prep brief 5 minutes before every customer call.

Footer.stopWastingTime: Stop wasting hours on manual account prep.
Footer.startAutomating: Start walking into calls fully prepared.
Footer.simpleReliable: Lightweight outreach and meeting intelligence extension for CSMs.

phases.title: Install the Extension
phases.body: Click to install the NexaWorks Chrome extension. It integrates directly into your browser in under 60 seconds. No heavy onboarding or IT setup required.

phases.title: Connect Your Accounts
phases.body: Authenticate your Slack Connect channels, Zendesk support tickets, and CRM (Salesforce/HubSpot) through secure, single-click OAuth integrations.

phases.title: Get Executive Prep Briefs
phases.body: Five minutes before any scheduled customer sync call, get a clean, 1-page summary highlighting what happened over the last 14 days. Never walk into a meeting blind again.

services.title: The Morning Slack Triage
services.desc: Instead of waking up and frantically reading 40 unread Slack Connect channels, view a unified Daily Account Pulse. Overnight chat threads are auto-triaged into explicit bugs, feature requests, and churn risks, ready to push directly into Jira or HubSpot with one click.
bullets: Jira & HubSpot tickets in one click
Clear categorization of bugs & churn risks

services.title: The Surprise Inbox Fire
services.desc: When an angry client sends an escalation email, don't spend 45 minutes digging through Zendesk and Slack history. Open the extension to read a 5-bullet crisis summary and reply fully informed in under 3 minutes.

services.title: The Routine Sync Prep
services.desc: Weekly or bi-weekly sync calls are usually low-prep. Our extension pings you 5 minutes before scheduled Zoom meetings with a micro-brief highlighting the last 14 days, making you look like a genius on every routine call.

FAQ.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subhead: Everything you need to know about NexaWorks.

faqs.question: Is NexaWorks secure and enterprise-safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. NexaWorks works entirely via secure OAuth connections. It reads your data silently to compile briefs for you. If your company has strict InfoSec policies, we offer a standalone mockup review or custom local deployments to satisfy security reviews.

faqs.question: Does this require VP or IT approval to get started?
faqs.answer: No. NexaWorks is built as a single-player utility for individual Customer Success Managers. You can install the extension and get instant value in under 5 minutes without a lengthy IT approval cycle.

faqs.question: What integrations do you support?
faqs.answer: We support direct OAuth integrations with Slack, Zendesk, Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, and Google Calendar.

faqs.question: How long does it take to get value?
faqs.answer: Under 5 minutes. You install the Chrome extension, connect your work accounts, and your next scheduled meeting will have a fully compiled executive brief ready.

faqs.question: Can I use this for QBRs (Quarterly Business Reviews)?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. While it is perfect for daily syncs, the executive brief provides a comprehensive history of the last 14 to 90 days, making QBR preparation take 5 minutes instead of 4 hours.

Results.headline: Get back 4 to 8 hours of your week.
Results.subhead: Immediate relief from manual data digging. Reclaim your time and make every customer meeting a win.

CaseStudy.headline: Loved by CSMs.
CaseStudy.subhead: Real feedback from Customer Success teams who replaced hours of manual data digging with NexaWorks.

studies.tagline: Reclaimed 6 Hours of Weekly QBR and Sync Call Prep
studies.problem: Prepping for weekly customer syncs and QBRs required logging into Slack Connect, searching Zendesk history, and checking old HubSpot notes. It took 3 to 4 hours per account.
studies.solution: NexaWorks automatically triaged Slack threads and compiled Zendesk tickets into a unified 1-page executive brief 5 minutes before every call, making the CSM look fully informed without the manual digging.

studies.problem: Angry customer escalations required 45 minutes of digging through support channels to figure out what was promised and what went wrong before replying.
studies.solution: CSMs used the NexaWorks extension to instantly view a 5-bullet crisis summary of Zendesk tickets and Slack messages, allowing them to reply fully informed in under 3 minutes.

MicroAudit.headline: The 1-Page Brief
MicroAudit.subhead: Here is what your pre-meeting brief looks like, delivered 5 minutes before your Zoom call.
MicroAudit.transcript: "High Risk: Unresolved Zendesk Ticket #402. Slack thread indicates anger over latency. Last CRM note mentions renewal discussions next month."
